steps.title: Locate the named moon
steps.content: The passage directly states that scientists used the Voyager 1 space probe to discover Adrastea in 1979. That sentence gives the requested year.

steps.title: Reject other years
steps.content: Choice B and Choice C are not given as Adrastea's discovery year. Choice D is 1610, the year Galileo discovered Io, so it belongs to a different moon.

steps.title: Use the stated year
steps.content: Choice A gives 1979, the year the passage explicitly associates with the discovery of Adrastea. The answer is A.
